calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Order Determining Entitlement To Escheated Property And Ordering Payment To Entitled Parties
Off Calendar May-27-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Mangini for Estate Research Associates, Inc. Paul Elissiry President of Estate Research Associates also present. Candace Fry appeared by telephone for Trinity Mountain Tracing Agency. Daniel Powell for Controller's Office/Attorney General's Office.

Mr. Powell stated that there is no opposition from the Controller's Office. The Parties generalized as to the services provided and addressed how many hours were expended doing research to locate Heirs. Mr. Mangini stated that he did not provide notice of today's hearing. Ms. Fry stated that she did provide notice. Mr. Elissary explained how he conducts his business and how the fees are shared. Counsel provided further argument to support their positions with regard to their fee percentages. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition To Recover Escheated Property And For Approval Of Partial Assignments Of Interest
